summary: Added render startup health gate (US-052). Created healthGate.ts that orchestrates shader compilation checks (via renderer.compile + ShaderErrorCollector) and geometry attribute validation (via validateGeometryAttributes) into a single non-throwing pass/fail checkpoint returning a structured HealthGateResult. Integrated into renderLoop.ts replacing the old throwing validateShaderCompilation pattern — failures now block steady-state entry while keeping the render loop alive on the placeholder for debugging. Added HealthGateResult and GeometrySystemInfo types to types.ts. All 14 unit tests and 7 integration tests pass (21 new tests). Full suite: 782 passed, build clean.
